assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Step 1 explicitly covers control plane upgrade first with gcloud container clusters upgrade --master command before any node pool upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Step 2 clearly defines sequential order: coordinators first (least critical), then data nodes, then masters last, with explicit rationale for each

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Overview section notes 'Regional pd-ssd PVs (survive node upgrades)' and rollback strategy confirms 'Regional PVs survive node changes - data is safe'

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Elasticsearch-Specific PDB Configuration section shows master PDB with minAvailable: 2 and explains 'allow 1 disruption, maintain quorum of 2'

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Node Pool Surge Configuration section shows all three pools configured with --max-surge-upgrade 1 and --max-unavailable-upgrade 0

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Each upgrade step includes health checks with curl commands for _cluster/health, and monitoring section emphasizes checking status between upgrades

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Pre-Upgrade Checklist includes 'PV reclaim policies are Retain' with specific kubectl command to verify this

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Post-Upgrade Validation section includes 'kubectl get statefulsets -n elasticsearch' and monitoring commands throughout

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Pre-Upgrade Checklist includes 'Elasticsearch snapshot backup completed' with specific curl command for creating pre_upgrade_snapshot
